title: pellaea stelleri
intro: Pellaea stelleri is a species of fern native to the Pacific coast of North America, specifically in the regions of British Columbia, Canada, and the western United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and pain, as well as its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pellaea stelleri include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as arthritis, wounds, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Pellaea stelleri can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used in traditional medicine.
